info.description: Web service that allows you to activate a certified e-mail.
info.title: Pec (Posta Elettronica Certificata)

tags.name: Pec
tags.description: Methods that allow you to register, activate and modify a certified e-mail

tags.name: Comunica Pec
tags.description: Methods that allow you to communicate a certified e-mail to the business register

tags.name: Domini
tags.description: Methods that allow you to activate and modify a certified domain

tags.name: Modulistica
tags.description: Methods that allow you to download the forms necessary for the management of certified e-mail boxes

data_nascita_richiedente.description: customer date of birth (accepted format: dd/mm/yyyy)

autorinnovo.description: if set to true, it allows the system to renew the account automatically upon expiration, trying to withdraw credit from the owner's purse

data_scadenza_documento.description: expiry date of the identity document (accepted format: dd/mm/yyyy)

documento_rilasciato_da.description: institution that issued the identity document

data_rilascio_documento.description: date of issue of the identity document (accepted format: dd/mm/yyyy)

pec_amministratore.description: Indicates whether the PEC (Certified Email) belongs to the administrator.

method.description: Indicate through which method you want to receive data with the callback, by default it is POST

field.description: Name of the field containing the callback return data

url.description: Url where the callback call will be made

data.description: Object to be completed at your convenience with additional data that you can use back with the callback

get.description: This method allows you to check if a domain is eligible for sending or receiving a pec

get.summary: Availability of a certified e-mail box
get.description: This method shows you the availability of a certified e-mail box

get.summary: List of your certified e-mail boxes
get.description: This method shows you the list of certified e-mail boxes that belong to your account

example.message: no pec linked to this account
the domain $dominio is non-existent in the system or belongs to someone else
data_nascita_richiedente not valid, accepted format: dd/mm/yyyy

get.description: This method shows you the specific certified e-mail address related to the id

delete.description: This method allows you to revoke the specific certified e-mail address related to the id

example.message: your pec has already been revoked
you can revoke the pec only if it is active

patch.description: This method allows you, once you have registered your certified electronic mailbox, to activate it by uploading the necessary documentation. The required documentation includes your valid identity document and the completed and signed activation form that you can download using the method GET/pec/{id}/modulo_attivazione. For the boxes of type DOMICILIODIGITALE and PECMASSIVA it is necessary to create a single document comprising the signed activation form and the identity document. If you have uploaded the incorrect documents the request will assume the status of 'documenti_errati' which will allow you to use the activation endpoint again to upload them correctly.

oneOf.description: base64_encode(file content); only pdf files are allowed

items.description: base64_encode(file content); only pdf files are allowed

example.message: you can activate the pec only when it is in the 'registrata|documenti_errati' state

patch.description: This method allows you to change the space of a certified e-mail. You can change the disk space('spazio_disco'), the security archive space('spazio_storico') and the standard storage space('spazio_conservazione'). Only a space upgrade is allowed. Action not allowed for these two types of boxes: DOMICILIODIGITALE, PECMASSIVA.

spazio_disco.description: If you put the + symbol in front you go to add space to what you have. If you pass only a number go to set the space with that value.

spazio_storico.description: If you put the + symbol in front you go to add space to what you have. If you pass only a number go to set the space with that value.

spazio_conservazione.description: If you put the + symbol in front you go to add space to what you have. If you pass only a number go to set the space with that value.

example.message: the system only takes into account multiples of 1024
you must first activate the 'conservazione' service

patch.summary: Activation of conservation according to law
patch.description: This method allows you to activate the standard storage service in your certified e-mail. Action not allowed for these two types of boxes: DOMICILIODIGITALE, PECMASSIVA.

spazio_conservazione.description: If this parameter is not passed it is set to 512 by default

oneOf.description: base64_encode(file content); only pdf files are allowed

items.description: base64_encode(file content); only pdf files are allowed

patch.description: This method allows you to change the type of certified email. Only upgrades are allowed, for example from a STANDARD you can switch to a SILVER or GOLD one. Action not allowed for these two types of boxes: DOMICILIODIGITALE, PECMASSIVA.

example.message: a downgrade of the 'tipo_casella' is not allowed; only SILVER or GOLD allowed
you can trasform your certified mail only if it has been processed

get.description: This method allows you to renew for one year or re-activate the certified e-mail identified by the id

parameters.name: anni
parameters.description: Number of years for which you want to renew the pec box. If not passed it is 1 by default

example.message: you can renew only evaded or revoked pec

post.description: This method allows you to add a user who can use a pec box. It can only be activated on STANDARD, BRONZE, SILVER and GOLD mailboxes.

example.message: this service cannot be activated on these boxes: DOMICILIODIGITALE|PECMASSIVA

get.description: This method shows you all the certified e-mail communications to the business register started

example.message: no request linked to this account

post.description: This method allows you to communicate a certified e-mail to the business register

get.description: This method returns you the specific request marked with the id

patch.description: This method allows you to complete the request for communication of your pec to the business register by uploading the necessary documentation. The required documentation includes the completed and digitally signed in p7m format form that you can download using the method GET/comunica_pec/{id}/procura_registro_imprese.

oneOf.description: base64_encode(file content); only p7m files are allowed

items.description: base64_encode(file content); only p7m files are allowed

example.message: you can only upload documents when stato is 'in_attesa_di_documenti'

get.description: This method allows you to directly download the activation form of a certified e-mail. Once compiled and signed it will be passed in the form of a base 64 encoded string using the PATCH/pec/{id}/attivazione method together with an identity document.

schema.example: you cannot activate conservation if you do not first activate a pec

get.description: This method allows you to directly download the storage activation form for a certified e-mail. once compiled and signed it will be passed in the form of a base 64 encoded string using the PATCH/pec/{id}/conservazione method together with an identity document.

schema.example: you cannot activate conservation if you do not first activate a pec

get.description: This method allows you to download the pec communication form to the business register. Once digitally signed in p7m format it will be passed in the form of a base 64 encoded string using the PATCH/comunica_pec/{id} method.

schema.example: you cannot download this module, it doesn't exist yet

externalDocs.description: First time here? Generate a new access token
